mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, item_name AS itemName, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, daily_count AS dailyCount, dose_time AS doseTime, status, memo, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, item_seq AS itemSeq, item_name AS itemName, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, daily_count AS dailyCount, dose_time AS doseTime, status, memo, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_medicine WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND CURDATE() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date AND status != '중단' ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_medicine ( user_id, item_seq, item_name, start_date, end_date, daily_count, dose_time, status, memo ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{itemSeq}, #{itemName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{dailyCount}, #{doseTime}, #{status}, #{memo} )
